authorization_phrase: Authorize s18-d1 broad-universe weekly relative-strength rotation P10 OOS gate only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.
diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED.
framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60); s18 weekly is the first candidate to clear it AND P10
honest_caveats_load_bearing: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY and NOT live-ready: the 6-gate live-block + FRC-never-granted apply regardless of the OOS pass. P10_CONFIRMED is a research-phase status, NOT a promotion, NOT money-proven, NOT live/paper-ready.
OOS edge is THINNER than IS: expectancy +$210.43/trade OOS vs +$370.28 IS; sharpe +0.125 OOS vs +0.187 IS. The edge degraded out-of-sample (as expected for a real but modest premium).

Within-OOS fragility: K13's most-recent fold F5 (2024-09..2025-12) was NEGATIVE. The contiguous-OOS positive (+$39,786) is driven substantially by strong early-2024 (the tail of the strongly-positive K13 F4); the most recent ~15 months were weak/negative. Forward expectation should weight the recent weakness, not the headline OOS total.
K13 was a MARGINAL pass (exactly 3/5 folds positive); 2 of 5 folds (incl. the most recent) were non-positive. Persistence is real but not strong.
Single OOS window, single universe: this is one 2024-2025 hold-out on one 24-name basket. It is NOT multi-universe or multi-period replication; generalization beyond this window/universe is unproven.
Weekly is the cost-heaviest rung (turnover ~20x); the cost margin is thinner than slower cadences (S2 edge-erosion ~6%).
inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, IS-only) PASSES: aggregate 229; per-fold F1/F2/F3 68/69/72 (~54-57/y); OOS projected ~100-113/2y.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Fold boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at DA22.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the s17 monthly economics (+$1,130.75/trade, win 63.5%, PF 2.42) were measured at MONTHLY cadence and do NOT carry to weekly. Weekly is the WEAKEST first-principles edge basis in the monthly/fortnightly/weekly ladder; the weekly edge MUST be re-proven at P6 IS (K1 sharpe_proxy>0 AND K2 expectancy>0).

STOP-BEFORE-PROMOTION (terminal, NOT a cadence/M tune): the pre-SEAL K9 gate PASSED (so SEAL proceeded); the EDGE is the remaining open gate. If P6 IS shows the weekly edge negative/zero (K1/K2 fail), OR K13 (P6.7) shows <3/5 folds positive, OR P10 measures OOS K9 < 50/y, the candidate is terminal. A further cadence/M change is a SEPARATE fresh candidate.

RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): RS-rotation practitioner-family native weekly cadence; signal 126-21 (ranking metric); select top-M=8 equal-weight; exit = loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop).
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) first-principles JUSTIFIED (not tuned, not K9-fitted, not tuned after the pre-SEAL measurement) and LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA6/DA8/DA10/DA11).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. Weekly is the highest-cost_drag rung in the family (~0.3-0.8% S1; ~1-2% S4) but clears <<5%; P6.5 cost-stress more load-bearing.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (top-8 ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).

s17/s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is a FRESH SIBLING (not an s17 _revN_/patch, not a rescue of the fortnightly s18 PLAN d2f0cc7); clears T-FORBID-16..24; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; cadence NOT tuned after the pre-SEAL K9 measurement.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

lifecycle_disposition.note: The candidate completed the full diagnostic ladder with a positive OOS. It is catalogued as the strongest diagnostic result of the s12->s18 line. It is NOT promoted; the framework provides no live-promotion authorization (FRC never granted; permanent 6-gate block). Any forward use requires separate, currently-unavailable, human-gated authorization beyond this research framework.

milestone.headline: FIRST candidate in the s12->s18 research line to clear the complete gated ladder under the walk-forward K13 discipline.
milestone.line_history: s12/s13 (futures) terminal; s14/s15 (mean-reversion) IS-FAIL; s16 (absolute trend) OOS-REJECT (DR4); s17 (monthly cross-sectional momentum) INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE (K9); s18 fortnightly K9-blocked at PLAN; s18 WEEKLY cleared P6 IS + P6.5 + P6.7 K13 + P10 OOS.
milestone.what_changed: Weekly cadence on the same 24-name relative-strength signal produced both adequate sample (K9) AND an edge that persisted across folds (K13, marginally) AND a positive contiguous OOS (no DR4).

no_live_promotion_authorization_exists: By framework design there is NO authorization phrase that promotes this candidate to live/paper/Strategy-Lab; FRC is NEVER_GRANTED and the 6-gate live-block is permanent. The above options are research-phase only.
rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL measurement projects ~100-113/2y (clears marginally) but the TRUE OOS K9 is confirmed only at P10; if measured OOS < 50/y at P10, terminal. The chain shall NOT relax K9.
report_kind: S18-D1 weekly RS rotation P11 lifecycle decision -- formalizes the disposition after a POSITIVE P10 OOS gate (no DR fired). s18 weekly is the FIRST candidate in the s12->s18 line to clear the full gated ladder (P6 IS + P6.5 cost-stress + P6.7 K13 + P10 OOS). The result is DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY and NOT live/paper/Strategy-Lab-ready; the 6-gate live-block + FRC-never-granted apply regardless.
title: s18-d1 weekly RS rotation P11 lifecycle decision memo (sealed; binding; P10 OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC; full-ladder pass; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY / NOT live-ready)
what_this_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate live/paper readiness or money-proven performance.
It does NOT demonstrate robustness beyond the single 2024-2025 OOS window on this 24-name universe.
It does NOT warrant promotion, Strategy Lab, broker connection, or FRC -- all remain blocked.
It does NOT imply the recent (late-2024/2025) edge is positive -- that sub-period was weak/negative.
